evidence: inject-context-items.ts landed at commit 2c3794a (creation); --context-items arg integration into compile-{explore,implementation}-context.ts at ad02726. Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 Explore re-dispatch uses --context-items framework-gaps:FGAP-035,tasks:TASK-031,decisions:DEC-0015) validated end-to-end: the rendered explore context at compiled-contexts/explore-fgap035-rendered-context.md embeds <context_items> with all three items verbatim; Explore agent dispatched against that context produced compiled-contexts/explore-fgap035-canonical-v2.md with 11 cascade-target rows; implementer agent dispatched against the downstream implementation context (which re-injected same three items) committed the fix without OR-hedging in any Required-change cell. Substrate items composed via extension tools into JIT-agent-shaped context per DEC-0014 substrate-IS-operating-surface principle. Schema-shape friction points filed inline: array_key heuristic (single-top-level-array discovery); id-field assumption; singleton-block-shape gap; colon-escape selector gap — all documented in script JSDoc + commit body 2c3794a per dogfood discipline.
